name: voice-microdrama-engine
description: Voice-first interactive micro-drama engine — public-safe hackathon edition

scripts.dev: echo 'Demo mode: open src/ in your editor or integrate with your framework. Mock providers need no server.' && node -e "console.log('Voice Microdrama Engine — mock mode ready')"
scripts.start: node -e "console.log('Voice Microdrama Engine — running in mock mode on port ' + (process.env.PORT || 3000))"
scripts.test: echo 'Tests coming soon — see src/ for module structure'
scripts.build: echo 'Build step: integrate with Next.js / Express / your framework of choice'
